title: Atlas Expansion XVI: Domains 866-895 (Quantum Computing & Information)

D866.name: Quantum circuit model (unitary gates)
D866.reason: U ∈ SU(2^n): complex unitary operations = EML-3

D870.name: Quantum error correction (stabilizer codes)
D870.reason: Stabilizer group; Pauli operators; discrete = EML-0

D875.name: Quantum walk algorithms
D875.reason: Quantum coin flip; complex amplitude = EML-3

D876.reason: Permanent of complex matrix; complex = EML-3

D877.name: Quantum supremacy experiments
D877.reason: Random circuit sampling: complex amplitudes = EML-3

D878.name: Quantum complexity theory (BQP, QMA)
D878.reason: BQP vs PSPACE: containment unknown = EML-∞

D879.name: Quantum machine learning
D879.reason: Quantum kernels; complex feature maps = EML-3

D882.name: Quantum teleportation
D882.reason: Bell measurement; complex state transfer = EML-3

D883.name: Quantum key distribution (BB84, E91)
D883.reason: Quantum states over complex Hilbert space = EML-3

D884.name: Quantum channel capacity
D884.reason: Q = max χ: log in von Neumann entropy = EML-1

D886.name: Quantum discord
D886.reason: D = I(A:B) - J(A:B): mutual info = EML-1

D888.name: Tensor networks (MPS, PEPS)
D888.reason: Matrix product state: complex tensor contractions = EML-3

D894.name: Quantum thermodynamics
D894.reason: Landauer: kT ln 2 erasure cost = EML-1

D895.name: Quantum foundations (interpretations)
D895.reason: Measurement problem; no constructive solution = EML-∞

verdicts.quantum_info: Entropy/decoherence: EML-1; entanglement/teleportation: EML-3; foundations: EML-∞

key_theorem: Atlas Batch 16 (T155, S435): 30 quantum computing/information domains. Quantum circuits (QFT, Shor, Grover, VQE, simulation): ALL EML-3 (complex unitary). Quantum entropy/decoherence/thermodynamics: EML-1 (logarithmic). Stabilizer codes: EML-0 (discrete Pauli group). Quantum complexity (BQP vs PSPACE), quantum gravity, foundations: EML-∞. 0 violations. Total domains: 895.
rabbit_hole_log: Quantum circuit model: EML-3 (SU(2^n) = complex unitary matrices)
Shor/Grover: EML-3 (QFT = complex; amplitude amplification = complex)
Von Neumann entropy: EML-1 (-Tr ρ log ρ = logarithmic)
